ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Trial
Off Calendar Jun-04-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Caroline Hinshaw appearing for Glenn Storek. Edward Thirkell appearing for Richard and Craig Storek. The matter has been settled. The settlement agreement is being signed. This status is off calendar.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Mary Ellen Scherer, CSR# 5208. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: M. Loos.

PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar Jun-04-2007 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Trial On Petition To Remove Trustees
Off Calendar Apr-27-2007 Off Calendar

Petn. For Orders Removing Trustees
Off Calendar Apr-16-2007 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar Apr-26-2007 Continued To Jun-04-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Trial
Off Calendar Apr-16-2007 Continued To Jun-04-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Caroline Hinshaw and Joel Gumbiner appearing for Glenn Storek. Edward Thirkell appearing for Craig and Richard Storek. Mr. Thirkell has filed an exparte petition for OST. Court ruled that discovery matter should be heard in discovery department. Mediation is scheduled for 4/30. Trial will take 3 to 5 days. Mr. Thirkell did not agree with the length of the trial. Cour is not leaving the trial in this department on 4/26 and 4/27. Matter is referred to the Presiding Judge to set for trial. Order signed. Matter is continued to 6/4 for status conference.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: A. Aguerre.

Petn. For Orders Removing Trustees
Off Calendar Jan-22-2007 Continued To Apr-26-07 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Caroline Hinshaw appearing for and with petitioner Glenn Storek. Edward Thirkell appearing for and with Richard and Craig Storek. Ms. Hinshaw is objecting to the response to reply filed last Thursday. Mr. Thirkell wants to set this matter for trial and start discovery. Court wants to encourage all parties to mediate to work things out. Matter is continued to 4/26 at 1:30pm and 4/27 at 9am for trial. Status on trial is set on 4/16. Counsel to file status conference statements by 4/16.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

Motion To Transfer Action
Off Calendar Nov-20-2006 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Edward Thirkell appearing for Craig and Richard Storek. Carig Storek is in Court. Caroline Hinshaw appearing for Glenn Storek. Venue motion argued. Court is denying Motion for Transfer. Mr. Thirkell will file objections by 12/29. Ms. Hinshaw will file reply by 1/8/07. Matter is continued to 1/22/07. Ms. Hinshaw will prepare order. She will send it to Mr. Thirkell for approval as to form. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Floyd Butler, CSR#2518. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

Petn. For Orders Removing Trustees
Off Calendar Nov-20-2006 Continued To Jan-22-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Motion To Transfer Action
Off Calendar Nov-13-2006 Continued To Nov-20-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petn. For Orders Removing Trustees
Off Calendar Nov-13-2006 Continued To Nov-20-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petn. For Orders Removing Trustees
Off Calendar Sep-18-2006 Continued To Nov-13-06 At 11:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Motion To Transfer Action
Off Calendar Sep-18-2006 Continued To Nov-13-06 At 11:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Edward Thirkell appearing for and with Craig Storek and Richard Storek. Caroline Hinshaw appearing for Glenn Storek. Parties agree to mediate. They have named Bette Epstein as the mediator. Mediation will take place on 10/12. All matters are continued to 11/13 at 11:00am. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Helen Rorep-Matley. Clerk: Ella Yip.

Petn. For Orders Removing Trustees
Off Calendar Aug-14-2006 Continued To Sep-18-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
